zh.Betchworth, Surrey, England, United King: 英國英格蘭素瑞貝華斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Browne Esq.於大約1502年出生在英國素瑞貝華斯時，他的父親Sir Matthew Browne31歲，母親Frideswide Guildford22歲。他和Katherine Shelley至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1546年2月15日之前在英國素瑞多爾金，埋葬在英國素瑞多爾金。

zh-hans.Betchworth, Surrey, England, United King: 英国英格兰素瑞貝華斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Browne Esq.于大约1502年出生在英国素瑞貝華斯时，他的父亲Sir Matthew Browne31岁，母亲Frideswide Guildford22岁。他和Katherine Shelley至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1546年2月15日之前在英国素瑞多爾金，埋葬在英国素瑞多爾金。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Browne Esq. was born about 1502, in Betchworth, Surrey, England, his father, Sir Matthew Browne, was 31 and his mother, Frideswide Guildford, was 22. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Katherine Shelley. He died before 15 February 1546, in Dorking, Surrey, England, and was buried in Dorking, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Browne Esq. est né environ 1502, à Betchworth, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Sir Matthew Browne, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Frideswide Guildford, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Katherine Shelley. Il est décédé avant 15 février 1546, à Dorking, Surrey, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Dorking, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Browne Esq. um 1502 in Betchworth, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Matthew Browne 31 und seine Mutter Frideswide Guildford 22. Er hatte mit Katherine Shelley mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 15. Februar 1546 in Dorking, Surrey, England und wurde in Dorking, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Browne Esq. è nato il circa 1502 nel Betchworth, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Sir Matthew Browne, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Frideswide Guildford, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Katherine Shelley. Morì prima del 15 febbraio 1546, nel Dorking, Surrey, England, e fu sepolto a Dorking, Surrey, England.

ja.Dorking, Surrey, England: イギリススリードールキング
ja.Beechworth Castle, Surrey, England: イギリスイギリススリー
ja.Betchworth, Surrey, England: イギリススリーベトチウオルス
ja.Betchworth, Surrey, England, United King: イギリスイギリススリーベトチウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: Henry Browne Esq.が約1502年にイギリススリーベトチウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Matthew Browneは31歳，母Frideswide Guildfordは22歳であった。彼はKatherine Shelleyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1546年2月15日以前にイギリススリードールキングで死去し，イギリススリードールキングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Browne Esq.(이)가 대략 1502년 영국 수리 베트ch워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Matthew Browne(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Frideswide Guildford(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Katherine Shelley(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1546년 2월 15일 이전 영국 수리 도르킨그에서 사망했으며 영국 수리 도르킨그에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1502–before 15 February 1546: ойролцоогоор 1502 он–1546 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 15–наас өмнө
mn.Betchworth, Surrey, England, United King: Betchworth, Sūþrīge, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Browne Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1502, em Betchworth, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Matthew Browne, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Frideswide Guildford, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Katherine Shelley. Ele faleceu antes 15 de fevereiro de 1546, em Dorking, Surrey, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Dorking, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Browne Esq. родился около 1502 г. в местности бечворт, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Matthew Browne было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Frideswide Guildford, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Katherine Shelley. Он умер перед 15 февраль 1546 г. в местности доркинг, сурри, Англия и был похоронен в местности доркинг, сурри, Англия.

sm.about 1502–before 15 February 1546: e tusa o le 1502–a'e le'I oo le 15 Fepuari 1546

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Browne Esq. nació aproximadamente 1502, en Betchworth, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Matthew Browne, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Frideswide Guildford, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Katherine Shelley. Murió antes de 15 de febrero de 1546, en Dorking, Surrey, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Dorking, Surrey, Inglaterra.
